basic_details.job_title: TIFR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Engineer, Tradesman and More Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Engineer (D), Jr. Engineer (B), Tradesman (B), Project Scientific Officer (C), Library Trainee, Temporary Work Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research has released the official Engineer, Tradesman & Various Posts Recruitment Notification 2026 (Advertisement No. 2026/5) in April 2026 at its official website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the TIFR Recruitment 2026 for various technical, scientific, and support positions. Eligible candidates aged up to 28/35 years with qualifications such as SSC, ITI, Diploma, Graduation, B.Tech/M.Tech can apply online from April 2026 to 16 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

important_dates.recruitment process: Written Test / Trade Test / Skill Test / Personal Interview (as applicable)

application_fee.details: Application fee details will be available on the official online application portal (if applicable). Pay online as per instructions on TIFR recruitment portal.

qualification.details: Nationality: Indian Citizens (as per Government of India rules). | Essential Educational Qualification & Experience (varies by post – refer detailed notification): | Engineer (D) [Mechanical]: M.E./M.Tech. or Ph.D. in Mechanical/Industrial/Production Engineering + minimum 2 years experience. Jr. Engineer (B) [Mechanical]: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering + 1-2 years experience in CNC machines. Tradesman (B) (Carpenter/Fitter/Machinist-Miller): NTC/NAC in relevant trade + 1-2 years experience. Project Scientific Officer (C): B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication + 1 year experience. Library Trainee: Graduate + B.Lib. (Science preferable). Temporary Work Assistant: SSC + minimum 1 year experience (basic science knowledge for one post). | Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026): Maximum 28 years (35 years for Engineer (D)). Age relaxation as per rules.

salary_details.details: Additional Benefits: As per TIFR rules (NPS applicable for regular posts).

selection_process: Mode of Recruitment varies by post: Personal Interview (for Engineer (D)

Jr. Engineer (B)) Written Test + Trade Test (for Tradesman posts) Written Test + Skill Test (for Library Trainee & Temporary Work Assistant) Written Test + Personal Interview OR Personal Interview only (for Project Scientific Officer) Document Verification and Medical Examination as per Institute rules. Final selection based on performance in test/interview.
how_to_apply: Apply online only through the official TIFR recruitment portal.
Fill details, upload required documents, and submit the application.
Applications from Government/Semi-Government/PSU/Autonomous bodies require NOC at the time of selection process.
Incomplete applications shall not be considered.
Click Here to Apply Online for TIFR Advertisement 2026/5
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying. Ensure eligibility (qualification, experience & age as on 01.01.2026). Applications accepted ONLY ONLINE. Selected candidates liable to be transferred to other Centres/Field Stations of the Institute. Posts at Sr. No. 6 to 9 are purely temporary. Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidate. The Institute reserves the right to restrict number of candidates or not to fill any/some posts.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for TIFR Recruitment 2026 is 16 May 2026. Candidates must complete the application process before the deadline. Incomplete or late applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TIFR Advertisement No. 2026/5?
faq.answer: A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under TIFR Recruitment 2026. These posts include Engineer, Tradesman, Library Trainee, and other positions. All vacancies are based in Mumbai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years for most posts and 35 years for Engineer (D). The crucial date for age calculation is 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The qualification varies by post, ranging from SSC, Diploma, Graduation to M.Tech/Ph.D. Technical and experience requirements are mandatory for many posts. Candidates must check the detailed notification for post-wise eligibility.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes written tests, trade tests, skill tests, and personal interviews. The exact process varies depending on the post applied for. Final selection is based on performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered in TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from Pay Level 3 to Pay Level 11 depending on the post. Some positions offer consolidated pay instead of pay scale. Additional benefits are provided as per TIFR rules.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official TIFR website. They need to fill in details, upload documents, and submit the application form. Applications are accepted only in online mode.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for TIFR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for TIFR Recruitment 2026 is 16 May 2026. Candidates must complete the application process before the deadline. Incomplete or late applications will not be accepted.
